title: Cooked batch weight UI
summary: COOK_MODE와 LEFTOVERS에서 음식-only 완성 중량, weigh-later, 지연 중량, unrecoverable, discard, adjust와 weighted/unweighed 종료 사유를 #8 ledger 계약에 연결한다.
goal: 새 mutation 없이 cooked batch 중량·잔량 상태를 정확하고 접근 가능하게 표시하고, irreversible·destructive action을 안전한 확인과 Train D gate 뒤에만 노출한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for any stage
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, security and API reviewer, five-axis reviewer, design critic, product-design-authority, implementation, Stage 3/6 and closeout; no self-approval

dependencies: cooked-batch-weight-ledger Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1082; its runtime is the implementation predecessor
cook-mode-whole-board must be merged and green before implementation; current roadmap implementation state does not satisfy this gate
meal-log-core #9 owns backend consumption links and meal-log-ui #12 owns consumed amount entry UI

external_smokes: owner-only completion delayed-weight discard adjust close and current cancel
same-key replay different-payload conflict stale revision and zero-write
unrecoverable no restore reversal or gram meal-log
weighted and unweighed six depleted labels with consumed-only eaten XP
Train D reader cutover before lifecycle action exposure
current and immediate-previous COOK_MODE LEFTOVERS compatibility
390px 320px desktop visual accessibility and product-design-authority evidence

verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of five core artifacts plus roadmap and status
separate Codex security authorization and API boundary review
separate Codex design critic review of refreshed COOK_MODE and LEFTOVERS contracts
separate Codex product-design-authority review of 390px 320px desktop runtime evidence
separate Codex Stage 3 Stage 6 and closeout reviews

out_of_scope: New cooked batch endpoint field status event type mutation nutrition pointer or direct DML
Meal-log day screen consumed amount add edit delete recent frequent or batch-event replacement owned by #12
Servings-to-grams estimate mutable-current nutrition recalculation or container tare persistence
Generic reopen unrecoverable restore or marker reversal
Adjustment depletion discard XP automatic meal entry or unweighed nutrition
Action exposure before #8 Train D reader cutover
Unmerged remote migration production write or feature activation
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned. Approval stays not_started until separate Codex internal1.5, security/API, five-axis and design reviews reach zero findings. Stage 1 current commands are docs validators/tests/lint/typecheck/audit/diff; component/E2E/visual/a11y/browser/remote evidence is future. Implementation waits for #8 runtime and cook-mode-whole-board. #11 reuses #8 mutations for COOK_MODE/LEFTOVERS presentation; #12 owns meal-log consumption UI.
